zh.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd是Meredith ap Owen和Unknown的女兒，於大約1414年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素。她於大約1429年與Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd是Meredith ap Owen和Unknown的女儿，于大约1414年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素。她于大约1429年与Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd was born about 1414, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales as the daughter of Meredith ap Owen and Unknown. She married Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion about 1429, in Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1478, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd est née environ 1414, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, fille de Meredith ap Owen et Unknown. Elle a épousé Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion environ 1429, à Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1478, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd wurde um 1414 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, als Tochter von Meredith ap Owen und Unknown geboren. Sie hat um 1429 in Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1478 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Carmarthenshire, Wales: Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd è nata il circa 1414 nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles come figlia di Meredith ap Owen e Unknown. Lei sposato Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion circa 1429, nel Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1478, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Mareduddは約1414年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルでMeredith ap OwenとUnknownの娘として生まれた。約1429年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアコウニーでDafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd(은)는 대략 1414년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 Meredith ap Owen(와)과 Unknown의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1429년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 코우니에서 Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Carmarthenshire, Wales: Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd nasceu aproximadamente 1414, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales filha de Meredith ap Owen e Unknown. Ela casou-se com Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion aproximadamente 1429, em Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1478, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd родилась около 1414 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Meredith ap Owen и Unknown. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion около 1429 г. в местности коуни, монтгомиришир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1478 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Verch Maredudd nació aproximadamente 1414, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales como hija de Meredith ap Owen y Unknown. Se casó con Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion aproximadamente 1429, en Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1478, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
